narrative: USD bid as Fed's Williams warns of emerging supply chain disruptions and energy shock inflation — DXY firms +0.15%. EUR/USD pressured at 1.1786; GBP/USD offered near 1.3538. USD/JPY holds above 159.08, supported by Fed-BoJ rate differential. Gold higher +0.06% on safe-haven demand amid elevated VIX at 18.6 and equity gains +0.35%.
